events.title: Israel strikes Hezbollah targets in Beirut's southern suburbs
events.desc: Israel stated that its military attacked Hezbollah targets in the southern suburbs of Beirut in response to Hezbollah launching projectiles into Israeli territory. The Lebanese state news agency reported that two people were killed in the strikes. This escalation occurs amid expectations of an imminent US-Iran deal to end the Middle East war.

events.title: Three dead as Israel strikes Hezbollah in Beirut's southern suburbs
events.desc: Israel carried out strikes in Beirut's southern suburbs, resulting in three fatalities. This action was in retaliation for what Israel claimed was Hezbollah firing into northern Israel. The Israeli military also conducted broader strikes across southern Lebanon. The escalation coincides with potential US-Iran peace deal talks, though Iran's chief negotiator expressed pessimism.

events.title: Lebanon reports strikes on south, east as Israel issues broad evacuation warnings
events.desc: Lebanon reported Israeli strikes in its southern and eastern regions, with the Israeli army issuing evacuation warnings for Nabatieh and over twenty other locations. These strikes occur as the US and Iran signal closeness to a deal that could encompass Lebanon, which was drawn into the conflict by Hezbollah's support for Tehran.

events.title: Trump decries Israeli strike on Beirut, insists deal still close
events.desc: Donald Trump criticized an Israeli strike on Beirut, stating it "should not have happened" and that it drew a strong protest from Iran, potentially jeopardizing his pledge for a Sunday peace deal signing. Despite this, dialogue channels remain open, and Trump maintains that a deal is "close."

events.title: US asks Anthropic to block global access to top AI models: Why it matters
events.desc: The US government has reportedly requested AI company Anthropic to block international access to its most advanced AI models. This move underscores a policy of export controls on high-technology, potentially impacting global AI development and access.

events.title: Israeli military says Hezbollah targets struck in Beirut
events.desc: Israel reported striking Hezbollah targets in Beirut, an action that Iran warned could jeopardize a US-brokered deal to end the fighting. The Israeli military identified the targets as belonging to the Iran-backed armed group.

events.title: Israel strikes Beirut suburb days after US-brokered truce
events.desc: Israel conducted strikes in a Beirut suburb, citing them as a response to Hezbollah's firing into Israeli territory. This action follows days after a US-brokered truce, raising concerns about the de-escalation process.

events.title: Three Indian sailors killed in US strike on oil tanker
events.desc: The US military attacked a Palau-flagged oil tanker, resulting in the deaths of three Indian sailors. The US stated the action was taken because the tanker failed to comply with directions, raising concerns about maritime safety and accidental escalations.

events.title: Israeli strikes in southern Lebanon kill 17, reports say
events.desc: Reports indicate that 17 individuals were killed in Israeli strikes in southern Lebanon, with nine fatalities occurring in the town of Tayr Debba. This is according to Lebanon's state news agency, highlighting ongoing kinetic exchanges in the region.

events.title: Iran and Israel say they will pause strikes but warn of retaliation if ceasefire breached again
events.desc: Both Iran and Israel have announced a pause in their strikes, with Israel's Prime Minister stating a current ceasefire. Iran's armed forces also confirmed a halt to military action, but both sides issued warnings of retaliation if the ceasefire is violated.

events.title: Israel attacks Hezbollah targets in Beirut's southern suburbs
events.desc: Israel stated its military attacked Hezbollah targets in Beirut's southern suburbs on Sunday after the Iran-aligned armed group fired into Israeli territory. The Lebanese state news agency reported that two people were killed.
